meta.title: Shared Components
meta.excerpt: Reusable component definitions used across multiple content types

seo.metaDescription: Reusable component definitions used across multiple content types

props.text: Documentation of 18 shared components in Strapi that provide reusable blocks for content composition across all collection types.

props.body:
title: String (required)
• subtitle: String (optional)
• backgroundImage: Media
• ctaButton: Component (Button Group)
• alignment: Enumeration (left|center|right)
• minHeight: String (CSS height)

Landing pages
• Article headers
• Homepage hero
• Campaign pages

title: String
• description: Rich Text
• buttons: Button Group (1-3 buttons)
• backgroundColor: String (color)
• layout: Enumeration (horizontal|vertical)

Promote premium features
• Guide user actions
• Newsletter signups
• Contact form prompts

title: String
• description: Text
• icon: String (icon name)
• image: Media
• link: String (optional URL)

Used in grid layouts (3-column)
• Supports up to 12 feature cards
• Responsive mobile stacking
• Optional hover effects

quote: Rich Text
• author: String
• company: String (optional)
• authorImage: Media
• rating: Integer (1-5 stars)

Card format with image
• Star rating display
• Company logo optional
• Carousel support for multiple testimonials

code: Text (required)
• language: Enumeration (typescript|javascript|python|sql|bash|etc)
• title: String (optional)
• showLineNumbers: Boolean
• highlightLines: String (comma-separated)

Syntax highlighting with Prism
• Copy button for code
• Theme support (dark/light)
• Line number support

Quote Block - Styled quotations with attribution
• Image Gallery - Image grid and lightbox
• Video Embed - YouTube/Vimeo embedded videos
• Text with Image - Content adjacent to image
• Three Column Grid - Generic 3-column layout
• Button Group - Multiple action buttons
• Breadcrumb Navigation - Hierarchical navigation
• Meta Tags - SEO metadata component
• Social Links - Social media profile links
• Author Info - Author bio with image
• Related Items - Links to related content
• Rich Text - Full rich text editor
• Video Gallery - Multiple video carousel
